  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Save Funding Source"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/api/pipeline/fundingsource/{pipelineId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Save funding source data for a program

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"description":"The ID of the pipeline to save the funding source data into","in":"path","name":"pipelineId","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"fundingSourceId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"pipelineFundingSource":{"type":"string"},"pipelineFundingSourceId":{"type":"string"}},"title":"QatTempFundingSource"}}},"description":"The funding source data to save","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode"}}},"description":"Returns a success code"},"403":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode"}}},"description":"User does not have rights to save this funding source data"},"500":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode"}}},"description":"Internal error while saving pipeline funding source data"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
